mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.target_type, c.target_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.parent_id, c.root_id, c.reply_to_user_id, c.depth, c.like_count, c.created_at, u.name AS user_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_comment rc WHERE rc.root_id = c.id AND rc.depth > 0 AND rc.deleted = 0 AND rc.status = 'VISIBLE') AS reply_count FROM t_comment c LEFT JOIN t_user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.depth = 0 AND c.deleted = 0 AND c.status = 'VISIBLE' ORDER BY c.like_count DESC, c.created_at ASC

SELECT c.id, c.target_type, c.target_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.parent_id, c.root_id, c.reply_to_user_id, c.depth, c.like_count, c.created_at, u.name AS user_name, ru.name AS reply_to_user_name FROM t_comment c LEFT JOIN t_user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN t_user ru ON c.reply_to_user_id = ru.id WHERE c.root_id = #{rootId} AND c.depth > 0 AND c.deleted = 0 AND c.status = 'VISIBLE' ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
